==== arrayObj.length ====
Returns an integer value one higher than the highest element defined in an array.

<code>
  var arrayObj = new Array( );
  arrayObj[0] = "Test";
  arrayObj[6] = "Another Test";
</code>

**Remarks**

As the elements in an array do not have to be contiguous, the **length** property is not necessarily the number of elements in the array. For example, in the following array definition, **arrayObj.length** contains 7, not 2
